videos.headline: Stanford's fumbled snap gives ball back to Ducks
videos.description: Stanford QB Keller Chryst never gets snap as the snap is botched and recovered by Oregon at their own 22-yard line.

videos.headline: Stanford is set up after interception
videos.description: Oregon QB Braxton Burmeister's pass is intercepted by Casey Toohill who returns it to the Oregon 45-yard line.

videos.headline: Stanford blocks punt, returns it for TD
videos.description: Oregon punter Adam Stack has his punt blocked by Brandon Simmons, who returns it two-yards for the touchdown.

videos.headline: Stanford drive stalls after INT in end zone
videos.description: Stanford QB Keller Chryst is picked off by Deommodore Lenoir in the end zone after the ball goes through the hands of JJ Arcega-Whiteside.

videos.headline: Stanford furthers onslaught with latest TD
videos.description: Stanford QB Keller Chryst hits Colby Parkinson for a three-yard TD giving them a 42-7 lead.

videos.headline: Stanford pouring it on with latest TD
videos.description: Stanford QB Keller Chryst connects with JJ Arcega-Whiteside for a 12-yard touchdown pass.
